rationale: Orient from a mechanism-relevant drug to target and pathway context, then confirm the disease mechanism in review literature.

ladder.what_it_gives: Candidate drug identity and available structured drug records.

ladder.command: biomcp get drug imatinib targets regulatory
biomcp get gene ABL1 pathways protein
ladder.what_it_gives: Target protein and Reactome pathway context.

ladder.command: biomcp search article --drug imatinib -g ABL1 -d "chronic myeloid leukemia" --type review --limit 5
ladder.what_it_gives: Review literature tying the drug, gene, pathway, and disease together.
